code:
# Part 1: Gather all monster drops
# Skeletons for skulls and bones
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')
# Pigs for pig skin
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Wolves for wolf bones and hair
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(16):
    fight('Hero')
# Flying Serpents for wings and serpent skin
move('Hero', 5, 4)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Cows for cowhide
move('Hero', 0, 2)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero')
# Mushmush for mushrooms
move('Hero', 5, 3)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Part 2: Gather raw resources
# Iron Ore
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(75):
    gather('Hero')
# Coal
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(125):
    gather('Hero')
# Ash Wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(57):
    gather('Hero')
# Birch Wood
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(95):
    gather('Hero')
# Jasper Crystal
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero')
# Spruce Wood
move('Hero', 2, 6)
for i in range(16):
    gather('Hero')
# Part 3: Craft intermediate materials
# Steel
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 25)
# Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 19)
craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 2)
# Part 4: Craft final equipment
# Gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'steel_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_boots', 1)
# Jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'skull_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'skull_amulet', 1)
# Weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)
# Part 5: Equip all new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'steel_helm')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'adventurer_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'skull_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'skull_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'skull_amulet')
# Part 6: Move to the Ogre and fight
move('Hero', -5, -5)
fight('Hero')

# Phase 1: Gathering resources from monsters
# Get wolf drops
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

# Get pig drops
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Get skeleton drops
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

# Get flying serpent drops
move('Hero', 7, 4)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Get mushmush drops
move('Hero', 5, 3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Get cow drops
move('Hero', 0, 2)
for _ in range(8):
    fight('Hero')

# Phase 2: Gathering raw materials
# Get wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(57):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(95):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 2, 6)
for _ in range(16):
    gather('Hero')

# Get ores and gems
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(84):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for _ in range(140):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for _ in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Phase 3: Crafting intermediate materials
# Craft planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 2)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 19)

# Craft steel
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 28)

# Phase 4: Crafting final gear
# Craft jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'skull_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'steel_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_amulet', 1)

# Craft gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'steel_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_boots', 1)

# Craft weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)

# Phase 5: Equipping new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'steel_helm')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'adventurer_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'skull_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'steel_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'skull_amulet')

# Phase 6: Fight the Ogre
move('Hero', -5, -5)
fight('Hero')

# Step 1: Gather all necessary monster drops by fighting monsters.
# Gather 14 Demon Horns from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)

    fight('Hero')
# Gather 7 Owlbear Hairs from Owlbears
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Red Cloths from Death Knights
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 4 Demoniac Dusts and 48 Pieces of Obsidian from Imps
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(48):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Cursed Books from Cultist Acolytes
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 5 Lizard Skins from Bandit Lizards
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 14 Vampire Bloods from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(14):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 5 Ogre Eyes from Ogres
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Step 2: Gather all raw resources from the environment.
# Gather 66 Dead Wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(66):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 333 Gold Ore, 2 Sapphires, 2 Topaz
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(333):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # for Sapphire
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # for Topaz
# Gather 30 Magic Wood
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(30):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 35 Strange Ore and 1 Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero') # for Diamond
# Gather 10 Magical Cures
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(10):
    gather('Hero')

# Step 3: Craft all intermediate and final items at the appropriate workshops.
# Crafting at the Mining station
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 39)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 12)
# Crafting at the Woodcutting station
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)
# Crafting at the Jewelrycrafting station
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)
# Crafting at the Gearcrafting station
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# Step 4: Equip the newly crafted gear.
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')

# Step 5: Move to the Reaper's location and initiate the fight.
move('Hero', 9, 6)
fight('Hero')

# Part 1: Resource Gathering
# Gather monster drops
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero') # Ogre for 4 ogre_eye, 4 ogre_skin

move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(18):
    fight('Hero') # Vampire for 18 vampire_blood

move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero') # Death Knight for 7 red_cloth

move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero') # Skeleton for 4 skeleton_bone

move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero') # Demon for 11 demon_horn, 11 piece_of_obsidian

move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(45):
    fight('Hero') # Imp for 45 piece_of_obsidian, 3 demoniac_dust

move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero') # Owlbear for 7 owlbear_hair

move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Bandit Lizard for 5 lizard_skin

move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Wolf for 5 wolf_hair

# Gather world resources
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(128):
    gather('Hero') # dead_wood
gather('Hero') # sap

move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(248):
    gather('Hero') # gold_ore
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero') # sapphire

move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero') # magical_cure

move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero') # jasper_crystal

move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero') # ash_wood

move('Hero', -1, 6)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero') # birch_wood

# Part 2: Crafting
# Craft intermediate resources
move('Hero', 1, 5) # Mining station
craft('Hero', 'gold', 31)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)

move('Hero', -2, -3) # Woodcutting station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 16)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Craft final items
move('Hero', 1, 3) # Jewelrycrafting station
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_amulet', 1)

move('Hero', 3, 1) # Gearcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

move('Hero', 2, 1) # Weaponcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Part 3: Equipping Gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm', 1)
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'sapphire_amulet', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# Part 4: Final Battle
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# 1. Gather monster drops
# Kill 5 Ogres for 5 ogre_eye
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 10 Vampires for 10 vampire_blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 9 Demons for 9 demon_horn
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 32 Imps for 32 piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(32):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 1 Lich for 1 life_crystal
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

# 2. Gather raw materials
# Gather 48 dead_wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 35 strange_ore and 1 diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(36):
    gather('Hero')
    
# Gather 7 magical_cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(7):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 205 gold_ore, 2 sapphire, 2 ruby
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(209):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Craft intermediate and final items
# Craft 6 dead_wood_plank
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)

# Craft bars and alloys
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 8)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# Craft gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# Craft jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# 4. Equip the new gear
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'ruby_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'ruby_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'artifact1', 'life_crystal')

# 5. Defeat the Cultist Emperor
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# Part 1: Gather all monster drops
# Gather Ogre materials
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(8):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Wolf materials

for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Death Knight materials
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Demon materials
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Imp materials
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(24):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Owlbear materials
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather wood and other resources
# Gather from Dead Tree
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero') # For sap
# Gather Ash Wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Birch Wood
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Gather ores and crystals
# Gather Gold, Sapphire and Ruby
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(59):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Iron Ore
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(21):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Coal
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Magical Cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
gather('Hero')
# Gather Jasper Crystal
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 4: Craft resources
# Craft planks at Woodcutting station
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)
# Craft bars and obsidian at Mining station
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 7)

# Part 5: Craft final gear
# Craft gear at Gearcrafting station
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
# Craft jewelry at Jewelrycrafting station
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ruby_amulet', 1)

# Part 6: Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'ruby_amulet')

# Part 7: Fight the Lich
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

# Part 1: Gather resources from monsters and nodes in the Forest and Graveyard.

for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather wood for Hardwood Planks

for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')

for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather crystals and ores

for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(70):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(42):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather from higher level monsters
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(15):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather final resources
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero')

for i in range(56):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero')

# Part 2: Craft all necessary components and final items.
# Crafting planks

craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Crafting bars and alloys

# Crafting Jewelry

# Crafting Gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# Part 3: Equip the newly crafted gear.

equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'emerald_amulet')

# Part 4: Move to the Lich and initiate the fight.
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Defeat the Lich to get a crucial Life Crystal.
move("Hero", 9, 7)
fight("Hero")
equip("Hero", "artifact2", "life_crystal")

# Part 2: Gather all resources needed for crafting.

# Gather monster drops
# Get 10 vampire_blood from Vampires
move("Hero", 10, 6)
for i in range(10):
    fight("Hero")

# Get 4 demon_horn from Demons
move("Hero", 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")

# Get 52 piece_of_obsidian from Imps
move("Hero", -1, 12)
for i in range(26):
    fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 0, 13)
for i in range(26):
    fight("Hero")

# Get 4 cursed_book from Cultist Acolytes
move("Hero", -1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")

# Gather wood and stone resources
# Get 72 dead_wood from dead_tree
move("Hero", 9, 8)
for i in range(72):
    gather("Hero")

# Get 40 magic_wood from magic_tree
move("Hero", -3, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather("Hero")

# Get 184 gold_ore and 4 sapphire from gold_rocks
move("Hero", 10, -4)
for i in range(188):
    gather("Hero")

# Get 7 magical_cure from magic_rocks
move("Hero", 3, 6)
for i in range(7):
    gather("Hero")

# Get 1 diamond from strange_rocks
move("Hero", -1, 7)
gather("Hero")

# Part 3: Craft all necessary items.

# Craft planks at woodcutting station
move("Hero", -2, -3)
craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 6)
craft("Hero", "magical_plank", 8)

# Craft bars at the forge
move("Hero", 1, 5)
craft("Hero", "gold", 23)
craft("Hero", "obsidian", 13)

# Craft the Gold Shield at the gearcrafting station
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "gold_shield", 1)

# Craft the amulet and rings at the jewelrycrafting station
move("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "sapphire_ring", 2)
craft("Hero", "diamond_amulet", 1)

# Part 4: Equip the new gear and fight the Cultist Emperor.
equip("Hero", "shield", "gold_shield")
equip("Hero", "ring1", "sapphire_ring")
equip("Hero", "ring2", "sapphire_ring")
equip("Hero", "amulet", "diamond_amulet")

move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")

# Part 1: Gather monster drops
# Gather 9 Ogre Eyes
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', -5, -4)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Red Cloths
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(2):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 7)
fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Cursed Books
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 9 Demon Horns
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather raw resources
# Gather 48 Dead Wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 5 Magical Cures
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 75 Strange Ore and 1 Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(75):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 101 Gold Ore and 2 Sapphires
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(101):
    gather('Hero')
    
# Part 3: Craft intermediate materials
# Craft 6 Dead Wood Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
# Craft Gold and Strangold
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 15)

# Part 4: Craft final gear
# Craft Gold Shield and Strangold Legs Armor
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_legs_armor', 1)
# Craft Greater Dreadful Amulet
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Part 5: Equip new gear
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'strangold_legs_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Part 6: Fight the Bat
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Gather resources from monsters.
# Gather Pig Skin from Pigs
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Ogre Eye from Ogres
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Wolf Hair from Wolves
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Flying Wing from Flying Serpents
move('Hero', 5, 4)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Lizard Skin from Bandit Lizards
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Vampire Blood from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(14):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Owlbear hair from Owlbears
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Demoniac Dust and Piece of Obsidian from Imps
# We need 8 demoniac dust and 76 obsidian. Fighting 76 times yields enough of both.
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(76):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Demon Horn from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather Magic Stone and Cursed Book from Cultist Acolytes
# We need 6 magic stone and 4 cursed books. Fighting 6 times yields enough of both.
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather resources from the environment.
# Gather Dead Wood and Sap
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(93):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero') # For Sap
# Gather Magic Wood and Magic Sap
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(75):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # For Magic Sap
# Gather Strange Ore and Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero') # For Diamond
# Gather Jasper Crystal
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Magical Cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(11):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather Gold, Sapphire, Ruby, and Emerald
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(269):
    gather('Hero') # For Gold ore
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # For Sapphire
gather('Hero') # For Ruby
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # For Emerald

# Part 3: Craft intermediate components.
# Woodcutting
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 15)
# Mining/Smelting
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 31)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 19)

# Part 4: Craft the final set of gear.
# Gearcrafting
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_helmet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
# Jewelrycrafting
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'emerald_ring', 2)
# Weaponcrafting
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'magic_bow', 1)

# Part 5: Equip the new gear.
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
unequip('Hero', 'ring1')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'magic_bow')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'strangold_helmet')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'obsidian_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'emerald_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'emerald_ring')

# Part 6: Fight the Cultist Emperor.
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# Part 1: Gather resources from monsters

for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')
# Get 32 piece_of_obsidian from Imps

for i in range(32):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather raw materials
# Gather 48 dead_wood

for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 205 gold_ore and 4 sapphire

for i in range(205):

for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 7 magical_cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(7):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Craft intermediate resources
# Move to the mining station

# Craft 23 gold bars

# Craft 7 strangold alloys

# Move to the woodcutting station

# Part 4: Craft the final equipment
# Move to the gearcrafting station

# Craft 1 Gold Shield

# Move to the jewelrycrafting station

# Craft 2 Sapphire Rings
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 2)
# Craft 1 Greater Dreadful Amulet
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Part 5: Equip the new gear
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'sapphire_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'artifact3', 'life_crystal')

move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Gather all necessary resources.

# Gather vampire_blood from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(23):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather red_cloth from Death Knights
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather dead_wood and sap from the Dead Tree
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero') # Dead Wood
gather('Hero') # Sap

# Gather demon_horn from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather piece_of_obsidian from Imps
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(56):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather magic_stone from Cultist Acolytes
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather wolf_hair from Wolves
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather ash_wood from Ash Trees
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather strange_ore from Strange Rocks
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather gold_ore and topaz from Gold Rocks
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(280):
    gather('Hero') # Gold ore
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero') # Topaz

# Gather owlbear_hair from Owlbears
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather birch_wood from Birch Trees
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather jasper_crystal from Jasper Rocks
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather magical_cure from Magic Rocks
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(7):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather lizard_skin from Bandit Lizards
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Craft all components and final items.

# Craft Planks at Woodcutting Station
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 3)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Craft Bars/Alloys at Mining Station (Forge)
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 35)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)

# Craft Weapon at Weaponcrafting Station
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_sword', 1)

# Craft Gear at Gearcrafting Station
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_helmet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# Craft Jewelry at Jewelrycrafting Station
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 2)

# Part 3: Equip the new gear set.

unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'gold_sword')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'strangold_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'obsidian_helmet')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'topaz_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')

# Part 4: Move to the boss and fight.

move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# Step 1: Gather resources from monsters.
# Move to the Demon's location and fight 16 times to gather enough 'demon_horn' and 'piece_of_obsidian'.
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(16):
    fight('Hero')
# Move to the Vampire's location and fight 5 times to gather 'vampire_blood'.
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Step 2: Gather resources from the world.
# Move to the dead tree and gather 48 'dead_wood'.
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
# Move to the gold rocks to gather 120 'gold_ore' and 3 'sapphire'.
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(120):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')
# Move to the magic rocks and gather 3 'magical_cure'.
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# Step 3: Craft intermediate materials.
# Go to the woodcutting station to craft 6 planks.
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
# Go to the mining station (forge) to craft gold and obsidian bars.
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 4)

# Step 4: Craft the final equipment.
# Go to the gearcrafting station to craft the shield.
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
# Go to the jewelrycrafting station to craft the ring.
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# Step 5: Equip the newly crafted items.
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# Step 6: Defeat the Bat.
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

# 1. Gather all necessary monster drops
# Kill a Lich for life_crystal
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')
# Kill 4 Ogres for ogre_eye
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 3 Death Knights for red_cloth
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 3 Cultist Acolytes for cursed_book
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 16 Imps for piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(16):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 4 Demons for demon_horn
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 5 Vampires for vampire_blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# 2. Gather raw materials
# Gather 48 dead_wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 40 strange_ore
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 144 gold_ore and 3 sapphire
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(147):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 5 magical_cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Process intermediate materials
# Craft Dead Wood Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
# Craft Gold, Strangold, and Obsidian bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 4)

# 4. Craft final gear
# Craft Strangold Legs Armor and Gold Shield
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
# Craft Sapphire Ring
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# 5. Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'strangold_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

code:
# Phase 1.1: Gather materials from monsters
# Kill 18 Vampires for vampire_blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(18):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 3 Death Knights for red_cloth
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 13 Demons for demon_horn and piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 35 Imps for the rest of piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(35):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 7 Owlbears for owlbear_hair
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 6 Cultist Acolytes for magic_stone and cursed_book
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 5 Bandit Lizards for lizard_skin
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Kill 5 Wolves for wolf_hair
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Phase 1.2: Gather natural resources
# Gather 336 gold_ore, 3 topaz, 2 sapphire from gold_rocks
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(341):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 90 dead_wood from dead_tree
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(90):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 40 strange_ore from strange_rocks
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 30 magic_wood from magic_tree
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(30):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 24 ash_wood from ash_tree
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 40 birch_wood from birch_tree
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 10 magical_cure from magic_rocks
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(10):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 2 jasper_crystal from jasper_rocks
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Phase 2: Crafting
# Craft intermediate materials
move('Hero', 1, 5) # Mining station
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 12)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 39)
move('Hero', -2, -3) # Woodcutting station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 9)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)
# Craft final items
move('Hero', 2, 1) # Weaponcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'gold_sword', 1)
move('Hero', 3, 1) # Gearcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
move('Hero', 1, 3) # Jewelrycrafting station
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_amulet', 1)

# Phase 3: Equip gear and fight
# Unequip old gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
# Equip new gear
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'gold_sword')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'strangold_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'topaz_amulet')

# Final battle
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Step 1: Defeat the Lich for an extra Life Crystal to boost survivability.
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')
equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal', 1)

# Step 2: Gather all raw materials from monsters.
# Ogres for eyes and skin
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(8):
    fight('Hero')
# Vampires for blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')
# Death Knights for cloth
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(2):
    fight('Hero')
# Skeletons for bones
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')
# Demons for horns
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Bandit Lizards for skin
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')
# Flying Serpents for wings
move('Hero', 5, 4)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Imps for obsidian and dust
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(36):
    fight('Hero')
# Owlbears for hair
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Wolves for bones
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Cultist Acolytes for books
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
    
# Step 3: Gather all raw materials from resource nodes.
# Dead Wood and Sap
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(240):
    gather('Hero')
gather('Hero') # For Sap
# Gold Ore and Sapphires
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(187):
    gather('Hero')
# Magical Cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(6):
    gather('Hero')
# Jasper Crystals
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero')
# Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
gather('Hero')
# Magic Wood
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Step 4: Craft all intermediate and final items.
# Crafting planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 27)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 8)
# Crafting bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 9)
# Crafting final weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
# Crafting final gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_boots', 1)
# Crafting final jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)

# Step 5: Equip the new set of gear.
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'lizard_boots', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet', 1)

# Step 6: Move to the Cultist Emperor and defeat it.
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

code:
# 1. Defeat monsters to gather resources
# Gather 4 Cursed Books from Cultist Acolytes
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 4 Demon Horns from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 20 Pieces of Obsidian from Imps
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(20):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Vampire Blood from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Skeleton Bones from Skeletons
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 3 Wolf Bones from Wolves
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# 2. Gather natural resources
# Gather 96 Dead Wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(96):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 40 Magic Wood
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 120 Gold Ore and 2 Sapphires
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(120):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 1 Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 3 Magical Cures
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Process resources at workshops
# Craft Dead Wood Planks and Magical Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 12)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 8)
# Craft Gold and Obsidian bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 5)

# 4. Craft final items
# Craft Gold Shield
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
# Craft Gold Ring and Diamond Amulet
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)

# 5. Equip the new gear
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet')

# 6. Fight the Bat
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')
